esign.auditTrail.title: Signature audit trail
esign.email.completion.body:
The document {documentType} has been signed by all signers.

You can download the signed PDF and full audit trail from the link below.
esign.email.completion.footer: This document is legally valid under Argentine Law 25.506 on digital signatures. Keep a copy for your records.
esign.email.completion.subject: {tenantName}: Document signed — {documentType}
esign.email.expiration.body: The signing deadline for {documentType} expired on {deadline} before all signers completed the process. Contact {tenantName} to receive a new request.
esign.email.expiration.subject: {tenantName}: Signing deadline expired — {documentType}
esign.email.invitation.body:
{tenantName} has sent you the document {documentType} for electronic signature.

Review the document and complete your signature before {deadline}.
esign.email.invitation.subject: {tenantName}: Signature required — {documentType}
esign.email.reminder1.body:
Reminder: the document {documentType} from {tenantName} is waiting for your signature.

Complete your signature before {deadline} to avoid missing the deadline.
esign.email.reminder1.subject: {tenantName}: Reminder — sign {documentType}
esign.email.reminder2.body:
Second notice: the document {documentType} from {tenantName} still needs your signature.

Few days remaining. Sign before {deadline}.
esign.email.reminder2.subject: {tenantName}: Second reminder — {documentType}
esign.email.reminderFinal.body:
Final notice: the signing deadline for {documentType} from {tenantName} expires tomorrow ({deadline}).

Sign now to prevent the request from expiring.
esign.email.reminderFinal.subject: {tenantName}: Final notice — sign {documentType} today
esign.modal.title: Send for signature
esign.reminder.tooltip: Reminder sent recently. Available again tomorrow.
